enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Due diligence requirements with respect to LSPs
(1) Digital lending by a bank involving a LSP, shall be carried out under a contractual
agreement between the bank and the LSP, which clearly defines the respective
roles, rights, and obligations of each party thereto.
enriched_requirements.object: a contractual agreement between the bank and the LSP, which clearly defines the respective roles, rights, and obligations of each

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

with a LSP for digital lending, taking into account LSP's technical capabilities,
robustness of data privacy policies and storage systems, fairness in conduct with
borrowers, past records of conduct and ability to comply with all applicable
regulations and statutes.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank shall carry out periodic review of the conduct of the LSP vis-à-vis the terms

Cooling-off period
(1) The borrower shall be given an explicit option to exit a digital loan by paying the
principal and the proportionate APR without any penalty during an initial "cooling-
off period".

credit policy, subject to the period so determined not being less than one day.

For

payable to / received by the DLG provider, as the case may be, before entering into

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall ensure that any DLG arrangement does not act as a substitute for

(3) Every time a bank enters into or renews a DLG arrangement, it shall obtain

to honour it.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such information shall, at a minimum, include a declaration from the

number of portfolios against which DLG has been provided.

The declaration shall

enriched_requirements.object: rates on similar portfolios

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Restrictions on entering into DLG arrangements
(1) A bank shall not enter into DLG arrangements for revolving credit facilities offered
through digital lending channel and credit cards as defined under the Reserve Bank
of India (Small Finance Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and
Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: for revolving credit facilities offered through digital lending channel and credit cards as defined under the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall not enter into DLG arrangements on the loans which are covered by
the credit guarantee schemes administered by trust funds as specified under the
Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: on the loans which are covered by the credit guarantee schemes administered by trust funds as specified under the Reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Structure of DLG arrangements
DLG arrangements shall be backed by an explicit and legally enforceable contract
between a bank and the DLG provider.
enriched_requirements.object: explicit and legally enforceable contract between a bank and the DLG provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such contract, among other things, shall contain
the following details:
(1) Extent of DLG cover.
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Extent of DLG cover

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Forms of DLG
A bank shall accept DLG only in one or more of the following forms:
(1) Cash deposited with the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: one or more of the following forms: (1) Cash deposited with the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cap on DLG
(1) A bank shall ensure that the total amount of DLG cover on any outstanding portfolio
which is specified upfront shall not exceed five per cent of the total amount
disbursed out of that loan portfolio at any given time.
enriched_requirements.object: of the total amount disbursed out of that loan portfolio at any given time

conditions:
In case of implicit guarantee
arrangements
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of implicit guarantee
arrangements, the DLG Provider shall not bear performance risk of more than the
equivalent amount of five per cent of the underlying loan portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: more than the equivalent amount of five per cent of the underlying loan portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The portfolio over which DLG can be offered shall consist of identifiable and
measurable loan assets which have been sanctioned (the 'DLG set').
enriched_requirements.object: measurable loan assets which have been sanctioned (the 'DLG set')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This portfolio
shall remain fixed for the purpose of DLG cover and is not meant to be dynamic.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of DLG cover and is not meant to be dynamic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This portfolio
shall remain "frozen" for the purpose of the specific DLG arrangement - meaning
that no loan assets can be added or removed from it, except through loan
repayment/ write-off.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of the specific DLG arrangement - meaning that no loan assets can be added or removed from it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ceiling for DLG cover on such portfolio shall be fixed at ₹2 crore (5 per cent
of ₹40 crore), which shall get activated proportionately as and when the loans
are disbursed.
enriched_requirements.object: crore (5 per cent of ₹40 crore), which shall get activated proportionately as and when the loans are disbursed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Then as on April 1, 2024, the DLG cover available for the
portfolio shall be ₹0.5 crore (5 per cent of disbursed).

Subsequently, if loans of ₹10 crore are further disbursed on April 15, 2024, the

In this case, the outstanding portfolio in the books of the bank would be ₹15 crore

of ₹1 crore (5 per cent of disbursed) has been exhausted.

In such a case, the
amount of the outstanding portfolio in the books of the bank as on October 31,
2024 shall come down to ₹14 crore (₹20 crore original portfolio less ₹5 crore loans
matured without any default less ₹1 crore loans which were in default and
recovered).
enriched_requirements.object: crore (₹20 crore original portfolio less ₹5 crore loans matured without any default less ₹1 crore loans which were in default and rec

<image>
(1) Recognition of individual loan assets in the portfolio as Non-Performing Asset
(NPA) and consequent provisioning shall be the responsibility of the bank as per

enriched_requirements.object: the bank as per the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) D

(2) The amount of DLG invoked shall not be set off against the underlying individual
loans, i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: the underlying individual loans, i

the liability of the borrowers in respect of the underlying loan shall remain
unaffected.

(4) DLG amount once invoked by the bank shall not be reinstated, including through

enriched_requirements.object: loan recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of DLG for regulatory capital
(1) Capital computation, i.e., computation of exposure and application of Credit Risk
Mitigation benefits on individual loan assets in the portfolio shall continue to be
governed by Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on

enriched_requirements.object: by Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case, DLG provider is a bank, it shall deduct full amount of the DLG which is
outstanding from its capital.
enriched_requirements.object: the DLG which is outstanding from its capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Invocation and tenor of DLG
(1) A bank shall invoke DLG within a maximum overdue period of 120 days, unless the
loan dues are made good by the borrower before that.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum overdue period of 120 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The period for which the DLG agreement remains in force shall not be less than the
longest tenor of the loan in the underlying loan portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: longest tenor of the loan in the underlying loan portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Disclosure requirements
(1) The bank shall put in place a mechanism to ensure that LSPs with whom they have
a DLG arrangement shall publish on their website the total number of portfolios and
the respective amount of each portfolio on which DLG has been offered.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism to ensure that LSPs with whom they have a DLG arrangement shall publish on their website the total number of portfolios and t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The name
of the lender(s) may or may not be disclosed as part of disclosure under this
provision.
enriched_requirements.object: disclosed as part of disclosure under this provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) Disclosure under paragraph (1) above shall be made on a monthly basis, with the

enriched_requirements.object: monthly basis, with the disclosure for any given month to be provided no later than seven working days following the conclusion of that m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Exceptions
Guarantees covered under the following schemes / entities shall not be covered within
the definition of DLG:
(1) Guarantee schemes of Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small
Enterprises (CGTMSE), Credit Risk Guarantee Fund Trust for Low Income Housing
(CRGFTLIH) and individual schemes under National Credit Guarantee Trustee
Company Ltd (NCGTC).
enriched_requirements.object: definition of DLG: (1) Guarantee schemes of Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE), Credit Risk Gu

enriched_requirements.object: Chapter

However
other loan products offered on Credit Cards which are not covered / envisaged under
the aforesaid Directions shall be governed by the stipulations laid down under this
Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: stipulations laid down under this Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, this Chapter shall also be applicable to all loans offered on Debit
Card, including EMI programmes.
enriched_requirements.object: all loans offered on Debit Card, including EMI programmes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
DLG arrangements entered between a bank and their LSP conforming to the
instructions laid down in this Chapter shall neither be treated as "synthetic
securitisation" as defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025, nor attract the provisions of 'loan
participation' as defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: "synthetic securitisation" as defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Direct

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of
paragraph 5 of these Directions, shall include, inter alia, appropriate single borrower
limits and aggregate limits for the portfolio of loans against collateral of jewellery,
ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collateral" for this Chapter);
enriched_requirements.object: single borrower limits and aggregate limits for the portfolio of loans against collateral of jewellery, ornaments or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also include appropriate documentation to be obtained and maintained
for loans proposed to be categorised under priority sector lending.
enriched_requirements.object: to be obtained and maintained for loans proposed to be categorised under priority sector lending

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may decide on a suitable approach for lending against eligible collateral as part
of its credit risk management framework, consistent, inter alia, with the principle of
proportionality and ease of access for small ticket loans.
enriched_requirements.object: approach for lending against eligible collateral as part of its credit risk management framework, consistent, inter alia, with th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, detailed credit
assessment, including assessment of borrower's repayment capacity shall be
undertaken in case the total loan amount against eligible collateral is above ₹2.5 lakh
to a borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the total loan amount against eligible collateral is above ₹2

conditions: Provided that in case of Bullet repayment loans
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case of Bullet repayment loans, the threshold loan amount for detailed
credit assessment shall be the total amount payable at maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: payable at maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may renew an existing loan or sanction a top-up loan upon a formal request
from the borrower, subject to a credit assessment in accordance with paragraph 34.
enriched_requirements.object: or sanction a top-up loan upon a formal request from the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such renewal or top-up shall be permitted only within the permissible LTV, and
provided the loan is classified as standard.
enriched_requirements.object: the permissible LTV, and provided the loan is classified as standard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, renewal of bullet repayment loan
shall be allowed only after payment of accrued interest, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: payment of accrued interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that
such renewals and top-ups are clearly identifiable in its Core Banking System or Loan
Processing System.
enriched_requirements.object: and top-ups are clearly identifiable in its Core Banking System or Loan Processing System

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not grant any advance or loan:
(1) For purchase of gold in any form including primary gold, ornaments, jewellery, or
coins, or for purchase of financial assets backed by gold, e.g., units of Exchange-
traded funds (ETFs) or units of Mutual Funds;
enriched_requirements.object: loan: (1) For purchase of gold in any form including primary gold, ornaments, jewellery, or coins, or for purchase of financial a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a bank may extend need-based working capital finance to borrowers who
use gold or silver as a raw material or as an input in their manufacturing or industrial
processing activity, where such gold or silver can also be accepted as security.
enriched_requirements.object: need-based working capital finance to borrowers who use gold or silver as a raw material or as an input in their manufacturing or industrial processing activity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank
extending such finance shall ensure that borrowers do not acquire or hold gold for
investment or speculative purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: not acquire or hold gold for investment or speculative purposes

A suitable
document or declaration shall be obtained from the borrower in all cases to the effect

enriched_requirements.object: borrower in all cases to the effect that the borrower is the rightful owner of the eligible collateral

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Multiple or frequent
sanction of loans against eligible collateral to the same borrower, aggregating to a
value in excess of a threshold to be decided by the lender, must be examined closely
as part of the transaction monitoring under the anti-money laundering (AML)
framework.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the transaction monitoring under the anti-money laundering (AML) framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not:
(1) Avail loans by re-pledging gold or silver pledged to it by its borrowers.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Tenor of consumption loans in the nature of bullet repayment loans shall be capped at
12 months, which may be renewed in terms of paragraph 35.
enriched_requirements.object: months, which may be renewed in terms of paragraph 35

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loans against ornaments and coins shall be subject to the following:
(1) The aggregate weight of ornaments pledged for all loans to a borrower shall not
exceed 1 kilogram for gold ornaments, and 10 kilograms for silver ornaments.
enriched_requirements.object: gold ornaments, and 10 kilograms for silver ornaments

conditions: in case of gold coins
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The aggregate weight of coin(s) pledged for all loans to a borrower shall not exceed
50 grams in case of gold coins, and 500 grams in case of silver coins.
enriched_requirements.object: case of gold coins, and 500 grams in case of silver coins

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Gold or silver accepted as collateral shall be valued based on the reference price
corresponding to its actual purity (caratage).
enriched_requirements.object: the reference price corresponding to its actual purity (caratage)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the lower of
(1) the average closing price for gold or silver, as the case may be, of that specific purity
over the preceding 30 days, or
(2) the closing price for gold or silver, as the case may be, of that specific purity on the
preceding day, as published either by the India Bullion and Jewellers Association
Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: purity over the preceding 30 days, or (2) the closing price for gold or silver, as the case may be, of that specific purity on th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(IBJA) or by a commodity exchange regulated by the Securities and Exchange
Board of India (SEBI) shall be used.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If price information for the specific purity is not directly available, the lender shall use
the published price available for the nearest available purity and proportionately adjust
the weight of the collateral based on its actual purity to arrive at valuation.
enriched_requirements.object: available for the nearest available purity and proportionately adjust the weight of the collateral based on its actual purity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of valuation, only the intrinsic value of the gold or silver contained in

enriched_requirements.object: other cost elements, such as precious stones or gems, shall be added thereto

shall not exceed LTV ratios as provided in the table below:
Total consumption loan amount per borrower Maximum LTV ratio
≤ ₹2.5 lakh 85 per cent
> ₹2.5 lakh & ≤ ₹5 lakh 80 per cent
> ₹5 lakh 75 per cent

outstanding loan amount to the value of the pledged eligible collateral or security, as
enriched_requirements.object: provided in the table below: Total consumption loan amount per borrower Maximum LTV ratio ≤ ₹2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The prescribed LTV ratio shall be maintained on an ongoing basis throughout the tenor
of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: ongoing basis throughout the tenor of the loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For conduct related aspects and collateral management, the bank shall be guided by
the instructions contained in Reserve bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Responsible Business Conduct), Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions contained in Reserve bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Responsible Business Conduct), Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall generally disburse loans into borrower's bank accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: borrower's bank accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall
comply with the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provisions of Sections 269 SS and 269 T of the Income Tax Act,
1961, and associated rules shall be complied with, as may be applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: may be applicable

conditions: In case of bank transfers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of bank transfers, the bank shall ensure that:
(1) Loan disbursals are made to the borrower's account and not to a third-party account

Running multiple loans simultaneously to a single borrower or a group of related
borrowers may be prone to misuse and susceptible to fraud.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Consequently, such
practices shall be subject to stricter internal audit and supervisory examination.
enriched_requirements.object: internal audit and supervisory examination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For instructions on disclosure requirements, the bank shall be guided by the

Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Nominated banks importing gold as per the provisions of the Master Direction - Import
of Goods and Services, as updated from time to time, may extend import-linked GML

markets (collectively hereinafter referred to as 'jewellers').

Provided that, jewellers who are not manufacturers themselves, may borrow under

A bank shall lay down a lending and risk management policy for GML which shall,

GML shall be subject to capital adequacy and other prudential requirements

A bank may decide interest rates on GML based on costs of procuring and holding

income.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances shall not be granted against retention money relating to services portion
of the contract.
enriched_requirements.object: money relating to services portion of the contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Exporters shall be advised to arrange, as far as possible, provision of suitable
guarantees, instead of retention money.
enriched_requirements.object: as far as possible, provision of suitable guarantees, instead of retention money

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall consider, on a selective basis, granting of advances against retention
money relating to the supply portion of the contract taking into account, among others,
<image>
the size of the retention money accumulated, its impact on the liquid funds position of
the exporter and the past performance regarding the timely receipt of retention money.
enriched_requirements.object: basis, granting of advances against retention money relating to the supply portion of the contract taking into account, among

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The payment of retention money shall be secured by LC or Bank Guarantee where
possible.
enriched_requirements.object: or Bank Guarantee where possible

conditions:
Where the retention money is payable after a period of one year from the date of
shipment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the retention money is payable after a period of one year from the date of
shipment, according to the terms of the contract and the corresponding advance is
extended for a period exceeding one year, it shall be treated as post-shipment credit
given on deferred payment terms exceeding one year, and the bank is free to decide
the rate of interest.
enriched_requirements.object: credit given on deferred payment terms exceeding one year, and the bank is free to decide the rate of interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, export on consignment basis shall be at par
with exports on outright sale basis on cash terms in matters regarding the rate of
interest to be charged by banks on post-shipment credit.
enriched_requirements.object: exports on outright sale basis on cash terms in matters regarding the rate of interest to be charged by banks on post-shipment credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall, therefore, adjust packing credit advances in the case of consignment
exports, as soon as export takes place, by transfer of the outstanding balance to a
special (post-shipment) account which in turn, shall be adjusted as soon as the relative
proceeds are received from abroad but not later than 365 days from the date of export
or such extended period as may be permitted by Foreign Exchange Department of the
Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: credit advances in the case of consignment exports, as soon as export takes place, by transfer of the outstanding balance

conditions:
if any, both at the pre-shipment
stage and at the post-shipment stage
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall provide finance to exporters against goods sent for exhibition and
sale abroad in the normal course in the first instance, and after the sale is completed,
allow the benefit of rate of interest on such advances, if any, both at the pre-shipment
stage and at the post-shipment stage, up to the stipulated periods, by way of a rebate.
enriched_requirements.object: against goods sent for exhibition and sale abroad in the normal course in the first instance, and after the sale is completed, allow the benefit of rate of interest on such advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such advances shall be given in separate accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall grant post-shipment advances to exporters against their duty
drawback entitlements and covered by ECGC guarantee as provisionally certified by
Customs Authorities pending final sanction and payment.
enriched_requirements.object: exporters against their duty drawback entitlements and covered by ECGC guarantee as provisionally certified by Customs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The advance against duty drawback receivables shall also be made available to
exporters against export promotion copy of the shipping bill containing the EGM
Number issued by the Customs Department.
enriched_requirements.object: to exporters against export promotion copy of the shipping bill containing the EGM Number issued by the Customs Department

conditions: Where necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where necessary, the financing bank
shall have its lien noted with the designated bank and arrangements shall be made
with the designated bank to transfer funds to the financing bank as and when duty
drawback is credited by the Customs.
enriched_requirements.object: with the designated bank and arrangements shall be made with the designated bank to transfer funds to the financing bank as and wh

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall, in the interest of export promotion and credit risk mitigation, consider
opting for export credit insurance products offered by ECGC Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: of export promotion and credit risk mitigation, consider opting for export credit insurance products offered by ECGC Ltd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The salient features
of the scheme, Export Credit Insurance for Banks (ECIB), may be obtained directly
from ECGC Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: ECGC Ltd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the post-shipment guarantee mainly benefits the banks, the cost of premium may
be borne by the banks and not passed on to the exporters.
enriched_requirements.object: banks and not passed on to the exporters

conditions: where the post-shipment credit is insured under an ECGC policy
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, even where the post-shipment credit is insured under an ECGC policy,
the bank shall not dilute their efforts towards realisation of their dues against long
outstanding export bills.
enriched_requirements.object: realisation of their dues against long outstanding export bills

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As per the extant Foreign Trade Policy, goods and services going to Special
Economic Zone area (SEZ) from Domestic Tariff Area (DTA) shall be treated as
exports.

The bank shall extend rupee pre-shipment and post-shipment export credit to
parties against orders for supplies in respect of projects aided / financed by bilateral or
multilateral agencies / funds (including World Bank, IBRD, IDA), as notified from time
to time by Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance under the Section
<image>
"Deemed Exports" in Foreign Trade Policy, which are eligible for grant of normal export
benefits by Government of India.
enriched_requirements.object: post-shipment export credit to parties against orders for supplies in respect of projects aided / financed by bilateral

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Packing Credit provided shall be adjusted from free foreign exchange representing
payment for the suppliers of goods to these agencies.
enriched_requirements.object: foreign exchange representing payment for the suppliers of goods to these agencies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also be repaid / prepaid
out of balances in Exchange Earners Foreign Currency account (EEFC A/c), as also
from the rupee resources of the exporter to the extent supplies have actually been
made.
enriched_requirements.object: prepaid out of balances in Exchange Earners Foreign Currency account (EEFC A/c), as also from the rupee resources of the exporter to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also extend rupee
(1) pre-shipment credit, and
(2) post-supply credit (for a maximum period of 30 days or up to the actual date of
payment by the receiver of goods, whichever is earlier),
for supply of goods specified as 'Deemed Exports' under the same Section of Foreign
Trade Policy from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: pre-shipment credit, and (2) post-supply credit (for a maximum period of 30 days or up to the actual date of payment by the rece

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall determine interest rate on rupee export credit pre-shipment credit and
post-shipment credit) as per the policy approved by their Board, subject to the
regulatory provisions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: rupee export credit pre-shipment credit and post-shipment credit) as per the policy approved by their Board

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 360 days from the date of
advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
on submission of export documents within 360 days from the date of
advance, or as indicated at paragraph 217 of these Directions, the advances shall not
be treated as export credit ab initio.
enriched_requirements.object: credit ab initio

conditions: If exports do not materialise at all
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If exports do not materialise at all, the bank shall charge on relative packing credit
domestic lending rate plus penal charges, if any, to be decided by the bank on the basis
of a transparent policy approved by their Board.
enriched_requirements.object: credit domestic lending rate plus penal charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be applicable to only
cash exports.
enriched_requirements.object: cash exports

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions with regard to Rupee Export Credit shall apply to export
credit in Foreign Currency mutatis mutandis, unless otherwise specified.
enriched_requirements.object: in Foreign Currency mutatis mutandis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exporter shall have the following options to avail of export finance:
(1) to avail of pre-shipment credit in rupees and then the post-shipment credit either in
rupees or discounting / rediscounting of export bills under EBR Scheme mentioned
in paragraph 322 to 346 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: to avail of export finance: (1) to avail of pre-shipment credit in rupees and then the post-shipment credit either in rupee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Choice of currency
(1) The facility shall be extended in one of the convertible currencies viz.
enriched_requirements.object: of the convertible currencies viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) To enable the exporters to have operational flexibility, it shall be in order for banks
to extend PCFC in one convertible currency in respect of an export order invoiced
in another convertible currency.
enriched_requirements.object: banks to extend PCFC in one convertible currency in respect of an export order invoiced in another convertible currency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risk and cost of cross currency
transaction shall be that of the exporter.
enriched_requirements.object: exporter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (3) The bank shall extend PCFC for exports to ACU countries.
enriched_requirements.object: to ACU countries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The applicable benefit to the exporters shall accrue only after the realisation of the
export bills or when the resultant export bills are rediscounted on 'without recourse'
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: realisation of the export bills or when the resultant export bills are rediscounted on 'without recourse' basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The foreign currency balances available with the bank in Exchange Earners Foreign
Currency (EEFC) Accounts, Resident Foreign Currency Accounts RFC(D) and Foreign
Currency (Non-Resident) Accounts (Banks) Scheme may be utilised for financing the
pre-shipment credit in foreign currency.
enriched_requirements.object: the pre-shipment credit in foreign currency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also utilise the foreign currency balances available under Escrow
Accounts and Exporters Foreign Currency Accounts for the purpose, subject to
ensuring that the requirements of funds by the account holders for permissible
<image>
transactions are met and the limit prescribed for maintaining maximum balance in the
account under broad based facility is not exceeded.
enriched_requirements.object: currency balances available under Escrow Accounts and Exporters Foreign Currency Accounts for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Foreign currency borrowings
(1) In addition, the bank may arrange for borrowings from abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: abroad

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
negotiate lines of credit with overseas banks for the purpose of grant of PCFC to
exporters without the prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: with overseas banks for the purpose of grant of PCFC to exporters without the prior approval of the Reserve Bank

conditions:
if they are not in a
position to raise loans from abroad on their own
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank shall avail of lines of credit from other banks in India if they are not in a
position to raise loans from abroad on their own, provided the bank does not have
a branch abroad.
enriched_requirements.object: credit from other banks in India if they are not in a position to raise loans from abroad on their own

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The bank shall draw on the line of credit arranged only to the extent of loans granted
by them to the exporters under the PCFC.
enriched_requirements.object: of credit arranged only to the extent of loans granted by them to the exporters under the PCFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, where the overseas bank
making available the line of credit stipulates a minimum amount for drawals which
shall not be very large, the small unutilised portion shall be managed by the bank
within its foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL).
enriched_requirements.object: small unutilised portion shall be managed by the bank within its foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, any
pre-payment by the exporter shall also be taken within the foreign exchange
position and AGL limits.
enriched_requirements.object: the foreign exchange position and AGL limits

conditions:
In case the exporters have arranged for the suppliers' credit for procuring imported
inputs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the exporters have arranged for the suppliers' credit for procuring imported
inputs, the PCFC facility shall be extended by the banks only for the purpose of
financing domestic inputs for exports.
enriched_requirements.object: banks only for the purpose of financing domestic inputs for exports

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall use foreign currency funds borrowed in terms of Notification No.
enriched_requirements.object: borrowed in terms of Notification No

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The PCFC shall be available for a maximum period of 360 days.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum period of 360 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any extension of
the credit shall be subject to the same terms and conditions as applicable for extension
of rupee packing credit.
enriched_requirements.object: same terms and conditions as applicable for extension of rupee packing credit

conditions: if no export takes place within 360 days
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further extension shall be subject to the terms and conditions fixed by the bank
concerned and if no export takes place within 360 days, the PCFC shall be adjusted at
T.T.
enriched_requirements.object: terms and conditions fixed by the bank concerned and if no export takes place within 360 days, the PCFC shall be adjusted at T

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the bank shall arrange to
remit foreign exchange to repay the loan or line of credit raised abroad and interest
without prior permission of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: exchange to repay the loan or line of credit raised abroad and interest without prior permission of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall consider denominating export credit facilities in foreign currency to
ensure that exporters are not adversely impacted by Rupee fluctuations.
enriched_requirements.object: facilities in foreign currency to ensure that exporters are not adversely impacted by Rupee fluctuations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall compute the overall export credit limits of the borrowers on an
ongoing basis say monthly, based on the prevalent position of current assets, current
liabilities and exchange rates and re-allocate limit towards export credit in foreign
currency, as per the bank's own policy.
enriched_requirements.object: credit limits of the borrowers on an ongoing basis say monthly, based on the prevalent position of current assets, current

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This may result in increasing or decreasing the
Indian Rupee equivalent of foreign currency component of export credit.
enriched_requirements.object: decreasing the Indian Rupee equivalent of foreign currency component of export credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Alternatively, the bank shall denominate foreign currency (FC) component of export
credit in foreign currency only with a view to ensuring that the exporters are insulated
from Rupee fluctuations.
enriched_requirements.object: component of export credit in foreign currency only with a view to ensuring that the exporters are insulated from Rup

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, for translation of
FC assets in the banks' book, the bank shall refer to Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025
F.6 Disbursement of PCFC
enriched_requirements.object: of India (Small Finance Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 F

conditions: In case full amount of PCFC or part thereof is utilised to finance domestic input
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case full amount of PCFC or part thereof is utilised to finance domestic input, the
bank shall apply appropriate spot rate for the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: for the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, while fixing the minimum lot, the bank shall take into account the
needs of their small customers also.
enriched_requirements.object: needs of their small customers also

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall take steps to streamline their procedures so that no separate
sanction is needed for PCFC once the packing credit limit has been authorised and the
disbursement is not delayed at the branches.
enriched_requirements.object: their procedures so that no separate sanction is needed for PCFC once the packing credit limit has been authorised and the di

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall be liquidated out of proceeds of export documents on their submission
for discounting / rediscounting under the EBR Scheme as detailed in paragraphs 322
to 346 of these Directions or by grant of foreign currency loans (DP Bills).
enriched_requirements.object: proceeds of export documents on their submission for discounting / rediscounting under the EBR Scheme as detailed in paragraphs 3

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to
mutual agreement between the exporter and the banker, it shall also be repaid / prepaid
out of balances in EEFC A/c as also from rupee resources of the exporter to the extent
exports have actually taken place.
enriched_requirements.object: prepaid out of balances in EEFC A/c as also from rupee resources of the exporter to the extent exports have actually taken place

conditions:
where packing credit required
is in excess of FOB value
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
agro based products like HPS groundnut, defatted & deoiled
cakes, tobacco, pepper, cardamom, cashew nuts, etc.) where packing credit required
is in excess of FOB value, PCFC shall be available only for exportable portion of the
produce.
enriched_requirements.object: exportable portion of the produce

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Substitution of order / commodity
Repayment / liquidation of PCFC shall be with export documents relating to any other
order covering the same or any other commodity exported by the exporter or amount
<image>
of balance in the EEFC Account.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to any other order covering the same or any other commodity exported by the exporter or amount <image> of balance in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While allowing substitution of contract in this way, the
bank shall ensure that it is commercially necessary and unavoidable.
enriched_requirements.object: commercially necessary and unavoidable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
also satisfy about the valid reasons as to why PCFC extended for shipment of a
particular commodity cannot be liquidated in the normal method.
enriched_requirements.object: valid reasons as to why PCFC extended for shipment of a particular commodity cannot be liquidated in the normal method

conditions:
if the exporter maintains account with the
same bank or it has the approval of the members of the consortium
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As far as possible,
the substitution of contract shall be allowed if the exporter maintains account with the
same bank or it has the approval of the members of the consortium, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: exporter maintains account with the same bank or it has the approval of the members of the consortium

conditions:
In case of cancellation of the export order for which the PCFC was availed of by the
exporter from the bank

if the exporter is unable to execute the export order for any
reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of cancellation of the export order for which the PCFC was availed of by the
exporter from the bank, or if the exporter is unable to execute the export order for any
reason, the exporter may repay the loan together with accrued interest thereon, by
purchasing foreign exchange (principal + interest) from domestic market through the
bank.
enriched_requirements.object: with accrued interest thereon, by purchasing foreign exchange (principal + interest) from domestic market through the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also be in order for the bank to remit the amount to the overseas bank,
provided the PCFC was made available to exporter from the line of credit obtained from
that bank.
enriched_requirements.object: for the bank to remit the amount to the overseas bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall extend PCFC to such exporters subsequently, after ensuring that
the earlier cancellation of PCFC was due to genuine reasons.
enriched_requirements.object: exporters subsequently, after ensuring that the earlier cancellation of PCFC was due to genuine reasons

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall extend the 'Running Account' facility under the PCFC Scheme to
exporters for all commodities, on the lines of the facility available under rupee credit,
subject to the following conditions:
(1) The facility shall be extended provided the need for 'Running Account' facility has
been established by the exporters to the satisfaction of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: facility under the PCFC Scheme to exporters for all commodities, on the lines of the facility available under rupee credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank shall extend the facility only to those exporters whose track record has
been good.
enriched_requirements.object: to those exporters whose track record has been good

conditions:
where pre-shipment credit 'Running Account' facility has been
extended
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In all cases, where pre-shipment credit 'Running Account' facility has been
extended, the LCs or firm orders shall be produced within a reasonable period of
time.
enriched_requirements.object: reasonable period of time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) The PCFC shall be marked-off on the 'First-in-First-Out' basis.
enriched_requirements.object: 'First-in-First-Out' basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) PCFC shall also be marked-off with proceeds of export documents against which
no PCFC has been drawn by the exporter.
enriched_requirements.object: proceeds of export documents against which no PCFC has been drawn by the exporter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall closely monitor the production of firm order or LC subsequently by
exporters and also the end-use of funds.
enriched_requirements.object: of firm order or LC subsequently by exporters and also the end-use of funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that no diversion of funds
is made for domestic use.
enriched_requirements.object: diversion of funds is made for domestic use

conditions:
In case of non-utilisation of PCFC drawals for export
purposes
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of non-utilisation of PCFC drawals for export
purposes, the penal provisions stated above shall be made applicable and the 'Running
Account' facility shall be withdrawn for the concerned exporter.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'Running Account' facility shall be withdrawn for the concerned exporter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall take any prepayment by the exporter under PCFC scheme within
their foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL) as indicated in
paragraph 282(3) of this Direction.
enriched_requirements.object: the exporter under PCFC scheme within their foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL) as indicated in paragraph 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank
shall charge the exporters the funding cost, if any, involved in absorbing mismatches
in respect of the prepayment beyond one month period.
enriched_requirements.object: funding cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also allow an exporter to book forward contract on the basis
of confirmed export order prior to availing of PCFC and cancel the contract (for portion
of drawal used for imported inputs) at prevailing market rates on availing of PCFC.
enriched_requirements.object: to book forward contract on the basis of confirmed export order prior to availing of PCFC and cancel the contract (for portion

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall allow customers to seek cover in any permitted currency of their
choice which is actively traded in the market, subject to ensuring that the customer is
exposed to exchange risk in a permitted currency in the underlying transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: cover in any permitted currency of their choice which is actively traded in the market

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While allowing forward contracts under the scheme, banks shall ensure compliance
of the basic Foreign Exchange Management requirement that the customer is exposed
to an exchange risk in the underlying transaction at different stages of the export
finance.
enriched_requirements.object: basic Foreign Exchange Management requirement that the customer is exposed to an exchange risk in the underlying transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rupee export packing credit may be shared between an export order holder and
the manufacturer of the goods to be exported.
enriched_requirements.object: export order holder and the manufacturer of the goods to be exported

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, the bank shall extend PCFC
also to the manufacturer on the basis of the disclaimer from the export order holder
through its bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the manufacturer on the basis of the disclaimer from the export order holder through its bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank
<image>
shall ensure that no double financing is involved in the transaction and the total period
of packing credit is limited to the actual cycle of production of the exported goods.
enriched_requirements.object: financing is involved in the transaction and the total period of packing credit is limited to the actual cycle of production of

conditions:
where the banker or the leader of consortium of banks
is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility shall be extended where the banker or the leader of consortium of banks
is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or, the banks
concerned agree to such an arrangement where the bankers are different for export
order holder and manufacturer.
enriched_requirements.object: banker or the leader of consortium of banks is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or, the banks conc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sharing of export benefits shall be left to the mutual
agreement between the export order holder and the manufacturer.
enriched_requirements.object: mutual agreement between the export order holder and the manufacturer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall be made available to both, the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit and the
receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: both, the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit and the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCFC for supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit shall be for supply of raw materials /
components of goods which will be further processed and finally exported by receiver
EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: raw materials / components of goods which will be further processed and finally exported by receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCFC extended to the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit shall have to be liquidated
by receipt of foreign exchange from the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit, for which
purpose, the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit may avail of PCFC.
enriched_requirements.object: by receipt of foreign exchange from the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit, for which purpose, the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit may

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The stipulation regarding liquidation of PCFC by payment in foreign exchange shall
be met in such cases not by negotiation of export documents but by transfer of foreign
exchange from the banker of the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit to the banker of
supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: cases not by negotiation of export documents but by transfer of foreign exchange from the banker of the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, there shall not normally be any post-shipment
credit in the transaction from the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit's point of view.
enriched_requirements.object: credit in the transaction from the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit's point of view

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all such cases, it shall be ensured by banks that there is no double financing for
the same transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: that there is no double financing for the same transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Needless to add, the PCFC to receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit
shall be liquidated by discounting of export bills.
enriched_requirements.object: of export bills

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall be allowed for 'deemed exports' only for supplies to projects financed
by multilateral / bilateral agencies / funds.
enriched_requirements.object: exports' only for supplies to projects financed by multilateral / bilateral agencies / funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC released for 'deemed exports' shall
be liquidated by grant of foreign currency loan at post-supply stage, for a maximum
period of 30 days or up to the date of payment by the project authorities, whichever is
earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: of foreign currency loan at post-supply stage, for a maximum period of 30 days or up to the date of payment by the project auth

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall also be repaid / prepaid out of balances in EEFC A/c as also from
rupee resources of the exporter to the extent supplies have actually been made.
enriched_requirements.object: prepaid out of balances in EEFC A/c as also from rupee resources of the exporter to the extent supplies have actually been made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
to the exporters shall accrue only after realisation of the export bills
and not at the stage of conversion of pre-shipment credit to post-shipment credit
(except when bills are discounted / rediscounted 'without recourse').
enriched_requirements.object: of the export bills and not at the stage of conversion of pre-shipment credit to post-shipment credit (except when bills

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The CBS / TFS shall be integrated with the APIs and other related messaging
platforms offered by the electronic Guarantee service provider, in Straight Through
Processing (STP) mode, without any manual intervention.
enriched_requirements.object: APIs and other related messaging platforms offered by the electronic Guarantee service provider, in Straight Through Processing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
User Roles for issuance of Electronic Guarantees
<image>
(1) The bank shall have an efficient system of 'Maker, Checker and Authorizer' for
issuance and monitoring of electronic Guarantees, while ensuring strict access
control and an effective segregation of the role and accountability.
enriched_requirements.object: of 'Maker, Checker and Authorizer' for issuance and monitoring of electronic Guarantees, while ensuring strict access control

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) No role involved in electronic Guarantee issuance lifecycle shall violate principle of
segregation of duties, four / six eye principle and no employee shall be allocated
roles / privileges across systems, applications that are conflicting in nature or in
violation of four/ six eye principle.
enriched_requirements.object: of duties, four / six eye principle and no employee shall be allocated roles / privileges across systems, application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The system access shall be provided only to specified users, and access through
generic user IDs shall not be permitted.

User review shall be continuous, at defined
periodicity and identifiable at any point of time with respective rights and privileges.
enriched_requirements.object: periodicity and identifiable at any point of time with respective rights and privileges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The user privileges shall be decided on "need to know/ need to do" basis.
enriched_requirements.object: to know/ need to do" basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Control Measures for issuance of Electronic Guarantees
(1) The bank shall have in place a system of periodical review and reconciliation of all
the electronic Guarantees issued / modified / cancelled, during the specified period.
enriched_requirements.object: system of periodical review and reconciliation of all the electronic Guarantees issued / modified / cancelled, during the specified pe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The issuance of electronic Guarantees shall be mandatorily covered within the
scope of concurrent audit and RBIA of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the scope of concurrent audit and RBIA of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Other aspects pertaining to issuance of Electronic Guarantees
(1) The robustness of the electronic Guarantee systems shall be part of the
Vulnerability Assessment / Penetration Testing (VA / PT), Information Systems
Audit.
enriched_requirements.object: Vulnerability Assessment / Penetration Testing (VA / PT), Information Systems Audit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (2) Dependence on the vendors for day-to-day transactions shall be avoided.

Access
to production systems shall be provided to vendors only in a controlled
environment, and audit trail shall be maintained.
enriched_requirements.object: only in a controlled environment, and audit trail shall be maintained

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM) tool shall be integrated with
the concerned servers and consoles / PCs connected to electronic Guarantee related
critical systems directly in its VLAN to generate automatic alerts.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned servers and consoles / PCs connected to electronic Guarantee related critical systems directly in its VLAN to generat

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The bank shall integrate electronic Guarantee systems with Privileged User
Management Systems / Identity and Access Management systems.
enriched_requirements.object: with Privileged User Management Systems / Identity and Access Management systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The logs of the
same shall be monitored through Security Operation Centre (SOC) setup.
enriched_requirements.object: Operation Centre (SOC) setup

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Business Continuity Measures and contingency plans for system failures, shall be
put in place by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall, not provide a guarantee favouring another RE to enable it to provide
any fund based credit facility to an obligor, unless specifically permitted by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: guarantee favouring another RE to enable it to provide any fund based credit facility to an obligor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that this clause shall not be applicable in case of credit facilities extended
against guarantees pertaining to trade related transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: of credit facilities extended against guarantees pertaining to trade related transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the bank may provide a guarantee favouring another RE for a NFB facility
extended by the latter.
enriched_requirements.object: another RE for a NFB facility extended by the latter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such guarantee issued by a RE shall be treated as an exposure
on the obligor on whose behalf the guarantee has been issued by it, for all purposes
including for the calculation of capital adequacy.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure on the obligor on whose behalf the guarantee has been issued by it, for all purposes including for the calculation of capita

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposure of the RE extending
credit facility against a guarantee shall be treated as a claim / exposure on the RE which
is providing the counter guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: claim / exposure on the RE which is providing the counter guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Only genuine trade bills shall be co-accepted, and it shall be ensured that the goods
covered by bills co-accepted are actually received in the stock accounts of the
borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: shall be ensured that the goods covered by bills co-accepted are actually received in the stock accounts of the borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Proper records of the bills co-accepted for each customer shall be maintained, so
that the commitments for each customer and the total commitments at a branch can be
readily ascertained, and these shall be part of internal audit.
enriched_requirements.object: the commitments for each customer and the total commitments at a branch can be readily ascertained, and these shall be part of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall not co-accept bills drawn by another lender or where the buyer /
seller has received funding for the underlying trade transaction from any lender.
enriched_requirements.object: another lender or where the buyer / seller has received funding for the underlying trade transaction from any lender

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks permitted as Authorized Dealer (AD) may extend NFB facilities as
permitted under the extant regulations / Directions issued under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999, for bonafide current or capital account transaction including
guarantees in respect of debt or other liability incurred by an exporter on account of
exports from India.
enriched_requirements.object: permitted under the extant regulations / Directions issued under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999, for bonafide current

conditions:
Provided that such guarantees shall not be
issued by banks
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that such guarantees shall not be
issued by banks, including overseas branches/ subsidiaries of Indian banks, for
the purpose of raising loans/ advances of any kind by the foreign entity except in
connection with the ordinary course of business overseas.
enriched_requirements.object: including overseas branches/ subsidiaries of Indian banks, for the purpose of raising loans/ advances of any kind by the foreign e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further while extending
such guarantees, banks shall ensure effective monitoring of the end use of such
facilities and its conformity with the business needs of such entities.
enriched_requirements.object: the end use of such facilities and its conformity with the business needs of such entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Only Scheduled Commercial Banks (SCBs) may issue guarantees on behalf of
stock/ commodity brokers in favour of stock/ commodity exchanges in lieu of
security deposit to the extent it is acceptable in the form of bank guarantee as laid
down by exchanges.
enriched_requirements.object: of stock/ commodity brokers in favour of stock/ commodity exchanges in lieu of security deposit to the extent it is accepta

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
SCBs may also issue guarantees in lieu of margin
requirements as per exchange regulations read along with other instructions
issued by Reserve Bank in this regard from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: lieu of margin requirements as per exchange regulations read along with other instructions issued by Reserve Bank in this reg

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank may provide Partial Credit Enhancement (PCE) to bonds issued by
corporates / special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding all types of projects and
to bonds issued by Non-deposit taking NBFCs with asset size of ₹1,000 crore and
above registered with RBI (including HFCs).
enriched_requirements.object: (PCE) to bonds issued by corporates / special purpose vehicles (SPVs) for funding all types of projects and to bond

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE may also be provided to bonds
issued by Municipal Corporations subject to adherence to, inter alia, paragraph 134
of these Directions as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds issued by Municipal Corporations subject to adherence to, inter alia, paragraph 134 of these Directions as amended from time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy of the bank shall incorporate suitable provisions for issue of
PCE, covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards,
assessment of risk, pricing, setting limits, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: issue of PCE, covering issues such as quantum of PCE, underwriting standards, assessment of risk, pricing, setting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCE shall be a subordinated facility provided in the form of an irrevocable
contingent line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for
<image>
servicing the bonds and thereby may improve the credit rating of the bond issue.
enriched_requirements.object: provided in the form of an irrevocable contingent line of credit which will be drawn in case of shortfall in cash flows for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The contingent facility may, at the discretion of the PCE providing bank, be made
available as a revolving facility.
enriched_requirements.object: of the PCE providing bank, be made available as a revolving facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A clear agreement documenting all aspects of this arrangement shall be signed
between the promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing bank, the bondholders
(through the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project.
enriched_requirements.object: promoter (bond issuer), the PCE providing bank, the bondholders (through the Trustee) and all other lenders to the project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement to this
effect shall be in the nature of a legally binding contract.
enriched_requirements.object: of a legally binding contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The documentation for the
facility shall clearly define the circumstances under which the facility would be
drawn upon.
enriched_requirements.object: under which the facility would be drawn upon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE exposure limit by a single bank shall be 50 per cent of the bond issue
size.
enriched_requirements.object: of the bond issue size

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE facility shall be provided at the time of the bond issue and shall be
irrevocable.
enriched_requirements.object: time of the bond issue and shall be irrevocable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the purpose of PCE by bank is to enable wide investor participation in the
corporate bond market, bank shall not invest in corporate bonds which are credit
enhanced by any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: which are credit enhanced by any Regulated Entity of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
They may, however,
provide other need based credit facilities (funded and / or non-funded) to the
corporate / SPV.
enriched_requirements.object: need based credit facilities (funded and / or non-funded) to the corporate / SPV

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Bank may offer PCE only in respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are
not lower than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment
Institutions (ECAI).
enriched_requirements.object: respect of bonds whose pre-enhanced rating are not lower than "BBB" minus as issued by accredited External Credit Assessment Institu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To be eligible for PCE, corporate bonds shall be rated by a minimum of two ECAI
at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum of two ECAI at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rating reports, both initial and subsequent, shall disclose both standalone
credit rating (i.e., rating without taking into account the effect of PCE) as well as the
enhanced credit rating (taking into account the effect of PCE).
enriched_requirements.object: rating (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE shall be available only for servicing the bond and not for any other
purpose (such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting
enriched_requirements.object: servicing the bond and not for any other purpose (such as funding acquisition of additional assets by the corporate, meeting

conditions: In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the PCE facility is partly drawn and interest accrues on the same, the
unpaid accrued interest shall be excluded from the calculation of the remaining
amount available for drawing.
enriched_requirements.object: calculation of the remaining amount available for drawing

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 30 days from the date
of its drawal
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping this aspect in view, a drawn tranche of the
contingent PCE facility shall be required to be repaid within 30 days from the date
of its drawal (due date).
enriched_requirements.object: repaid within 30 days from the date of its drawal (due date)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility shall be treated as NPA if it remains
outstanding for 90 days or more from the due date and provided for as per the
usual asset classification and provisioning norms.
enriched_requirements.object: if it remains outstanding for 90 days or more from the due date and provided for as per the usual asset classification and provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In that event, the bank's other
facilities to the borrower shall also be classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA as per extant guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCE providing bank shall observe the following exposure limits:
(1) PCE exposure by the bank to a single counterparty or group of counterparties
shall be within the overall regulatory exposure limits applicable to the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: limits: (1) PCE exposure by the bank to a single counterparty or group of counterparties shall be within the overall re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The aggregate PCE exposure of the bank shall not exceed 20 per cent of its
Tier 1 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of its Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The tenor of the bond issued by NBFCs / HFCs for which PCE is provided shall
not be less than three years.
enriched_requirements.object: years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The proceeds from the bonds backed by PCE from banks shall only be utilized
for refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs / HFCs.
enriched_requirements.object: refinancing the existing debt of the NBFCs / HFCs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall introduce
appropriate mechanisms to monitor and ensure that the end-use condition is met.
enriched_requirements.object: monitor and ensure that the end-use condition is met

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposure of a bank by way of PCEs to bonds issued by each such NBFC /
HFC shall be restricted to one percent of capital funds of the RE within the extant
single / group borrower exposure limits.
enriched_requirements.object: percent of capital funds of the RE within the extant single / group borrower exposure limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The effect of the PCE on the bond rating shall be disclosed in the bond offer
document i.e., the rating of the bond without and with the PCE shall be disclosed.
enriched_requirements.object: bond offer document i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that the project assets, created out of the bond issue for
which PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are
ring fenced through an escrow account mechanism administered under a bond
trustee arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, created out of the bond issue for which PCE has been provided by them, and the cash flows from the project are ring fe

conditions: if any, and the bonds and PCE
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The manner in which security interest in the project assets
would be shared by the lenders to the project, bond holders and banks providing
the PCE and the manner in which the project cash flows would be shared for
servicing loans, if any, and the bonds and PCE, shall be decided and agreed upon
before the issue of bonds and shall be properly documented.
enriched_requirements.object: upon before the issue of bonds and shall be properly documented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The project shall have a robust and viable financial structure even before the
credit enhancement is taken into account.
enriched_requirements.object: viable financial structure even before the credit enhancement is taken into account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Nevertheless, while providing PCE, the
bank shall exercise necessary due diligence and credit appraisal, including making
their own internal credit analysis/ rating.
enriched_requirements.object: and credit appraisal, including making their own internal credit analysis/ rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall honour the full PCE commitment irrespective of the asset
classification of the concerned borrower's credit facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: commitment irrespective of the asset classification of the concerned borrower's credit facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All extant regulatory prescriptions for credit and investment exposures by the
banks, unless specified otherwise in this Direction, shall continue to apply.

For disclosure of the details of NFB credit facilities, the bank shall be guided
by Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FEMA
8/2000-RB dated May 03, 2000;

Notwithstanding paragraph 427 above, bank shall comply with all the related
regulatory norms including Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: related regulatory norms including Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While extending finance to Government owned entities, banks shall specifically
ensure adherence with paragraphs 96, 134, 138, and 431 of these Directions, and
ensure that bank finance is not in lieu of or a substitute for budgetary resources
envisaged for a project, and that finance is not extended against receivables from
Governments
enriched_requirements.object: paragraphs 96, 134, 138, and 431 of these Directions, and ensure that bank finance is not in lieu of or a substitut

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Lending to MSMEs by the bank shall be guided by Master Direction - Lending
to Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME) Sector.
enriched_requirements.object: Direction - Lending to Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME) Sector

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall not extend bridge loans against amounts receivable from
Central / State Governments by way of subsidies, refunds, reimbursements, capital
contributions, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: amounts receivable from Central / State Governments by way of subsidies, refunds, reimbursements, capital contributions, e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It is clarified that the facility is being allowed as a purely temporary
measure and the fertilizer companies should strengthen their financial position
gradually so that they do not depend on the banks for finance against subsidy.
enriched_requirements.object: gradually so that they do not depend on the banks for finance against subsidy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No other subsidy receivables such as, those in respect of claims raised by units
on the basis of expected revision in retention price because of escalation in
costs of inputs and in respect of freight, etc., shall be financed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank may continue to grant finance against receivables from Government
by exporters (viz.
enriched_requirements.object: against receivables from Government by exporters (viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions,
or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
